positioning: Canonical event-layer schema for building long-term student memory. These events are the raw observations that can later be aggregated into student_memory_profile or exported into Cognee/graph storage.
design_principles: Store raw observations first, avoid overly strong conclusions at event level
Keep event schema compatible with current diagnosis / coach / review pipeline outputs
Allow future export to graph memory systems without changing upstream payloads
Prefer stable student_id / question_id / node_id references over free-form text matching

field_specs.event_id: Optional stable event id. Can be generated upstream or by the storage layer.
field_specs.event_type: One of diagnosis / coach / review / binding / student_choice.
field_specs.student_id: Stable student id. Recommended even if local single-student experiments omit it temporarily.
field_specs.session_id: Optional learning session id for grouping nearby events.
field_specs.occurred_at: ISO-8601 timestamp when the event happened.
field_specs.question_id: Stable question id when the event is tied to a specific example or wrong question.
field_specs.primary_node_id: Main linked knowledge leaf for the event.
field_specs.secondary_node_ids: Auxiliary linked leaves for the event.
field_specs.source_name: Optional content source, batch, notebook, or upstream pipeline source name.
field_specs.source_section: Optional chapter / section / material subsection name.
field_specs.metadata: Optional extra structured payload for future extensions.

field_specs.reason: Short explanation of why this error type was assigned.
field_specs.evidence: Quoted or summarized evidence from the student's answer.
field_specs.confidence: Optional numeric confidence from the diagnosis tool.
field_specs.coach_mode: Immediate coach mode suggested by diagnosis.
field_specs.coach_trap: Expected student trap extracted from diagnosis stage.
field_specs.coach_prompt: Suggested first-step coaching prompt or strategy hint.
field_specs.diagnosis_source: Which tool/path produced this diagnosis event.

current_pipeline_compatibility: DiagnosisResult.as_dict() wrapped with binding / annotation / source context

field_specs.error_type: Current working diagnosis type passed into coach stage.
field_specs.coach_mode: socratic_standard / socratic_light / direct_explain or future extended values.
field_specs.coach_trap: Main trap this coach turn is trying to address.
field_specs.coach_prompt: Resolved strategy prompt used for this turn.
field_specs.understands: Whether the student appears to understand at this turn.
field_specs.completed: Whether the current question has effectively been completed at this turn.
field_specs.turn_index: 1-based turn index recommended for event storage.
field_specs.done: Whether the coach session ended after this response.
field_specs.stop_reason: student_understood / max_turns / continue or future values.
field_specs.reason: Reason from reply analysis or coach fallback logic.

current_pipeline_compatibility: CoachResponse.as_dict() wrapped with binding / annotation / source context

field_specs.target_id: Question id or node id targeted by this update.
field_specs.result: For review_result events: correct / wrong / partial / skip.
field_specs.updated_payload: Optional full updated review_state snapshot after applying the action.
field_specs.linked_node_ids: Optional explicit node references if known at event production time.
field_specs.linked_question_ids: Optional explicit question references if known at event production time.

field_specs.candidate_node_ids: Optional top-k candidate node ids shown before final confirmation.
field_specs.binding_confidence: Optional recommendation confidence if the system proposed the binding.
field_specs.annotation_mode: Optional note about whether binding came from auto-route, tree-selection UI, or imported batch.

recommended_usage: Use when a wrong question is newly bound or re-bound to leaf nodes.
Use even if the final choice is made by the student, because that choice itself is valuable memory evidence.

field_specs.action_type: select_node / create_node / mark_important / request_more_examples / mark_mastered / request_reteach.
field_specs.target_type: question / knowledge_point / custom_node / session or future values.
field_specs.target_id: Main object the student explicitly acted on.
field_specs.selected_node_ids: Node ids the student explicitly selected in the tree UI.
field_specs.note: Optional free-text explanation from the student.

recommended_usage: Use for tree-based student knowledge-point selection.
Use for future UI feedback such as 'I still need more examples' or 'this is already mastered'.

aggregation_guidance.event_store_role: Event layer should preserve observation history and support replay / recount / later graph export.
aggregation_guidance.profile_builder_role: student_memory_manager.py or future rebuilder should aggregate these events into student_memory_profile.
aggregation_guidance.runtime_reading_role: coach_agent and review_scheduler should generally read aggregated profile output, not the full raw event history.
storage_recommendation: Local JSON/JSONL or SQLite is enough for first implementation.
Cognee/graph storage is recommended as a later storage backend, not as the default runtime prompt source.

minimum_mvp_guidance.reason: Diagnosis / coach / review already exist in code and can close the first student-memory loop. Binding and student-choice events become especially valuable once the tree-selection UI is in place.
